entities.description: the synthesizer is an operator that generates a coherent answer by aggregating refined evidence
analysis   merging generation is described as the final stage of a process involving the synthesizer operator
q is a variable representing a query or input used by the synthesizer operator
n is a variable representing refined evidence used by the synthesizer operator
a is the variable representing the coherent answer generated by the synthesizer operator
15 is the label or identifier for the equation describing the synthesizer operator s function

relations.description: the synthesizer operator is the key component used in the final stage of analysis   merging generation
the synthesizer operator takes q as an input parameter to generate the answer
the synthesizer operator takes n as an input parameter to generate the answer
the synthesizer operator produces a as its output
a is the subject of the equation labeled 15
q is a component of the equation labeled 15
n is a component of the equation labeled 15
